title: Agent Golems
description: Replaces Copper Golems with Agent from Education Edition.
body:
![Agent Golems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7599245af4b96b6fdf18d2e56d6b5b4d79eed5af_0.webp) Play with the other, sometimes forgotten, Minecraft robot: Agent! This adorable robot is only available in Minecraft Education, but has been ported to Minecraft Java using CEM. ![Agent opening a chest.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10c32aef2f9e4fd29dc25acc98cf0120915bd999.png) ---
![Optifine or EMF Required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/444a1c41b5b6db0cb8b2b0da5ad3c121c0ed5200_0.webp) This resource pack uses a feature called Custom Entity Models (CEM) to override models and animations. **This feature is required in order for this resource pack to function properly!** **[Download Optifine↗](https://optifine.net) [Download EMF↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [Download ETF↗](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** **What should I use?** I highly suggest using EMF and ETF if playing modded, however it's fine if you're using Optifine standalone. ![Agent offers the Copper Golem a flower.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d37a9737eddac2ae66ebe26156dc158c2292abf8.png) ---
![Known Issues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d7f2040d2abf33458323b42785df76639280daf_0.webp) ** Some items may look odd or positioned incorrectly when held.
** The point at which items are attached to the Copper Golem's hands is hardcoded. So, to get around this, the point is being overridden with Optifine's attachment point system due to Agent's different proportions. Unfortunately, this removes any special animations or translations that the original point had.
** Poppy flowers may look weird on Agent's head.
** Again, this is hardcoded and there is no workaround as far as I know of.
---
![Agent Keyart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1928eaf4a2b6a5a2a901f4e5c5a8c9addee36a8a_0.webp)
